title: Spot at Coca-Cola Europacific Partners | Boston Dynamics
summary:
Spot has arrived at Coca-Cola Europacific Partners (CCEP) in East Kilbride, Scotland! Avoiding downtime is paramount for manufacturers; CCEP GB is keeping their maintenance and reliability team a step ahead with the latest features in Spot® & Orbit. 

#BostonDynamics #CCEP #CocaCola

title: Robots Doing Stuff #61 | Bimanual Nut Pick and Threading
summary:
This is a real customer task: one step in a longer multi-part sequence we’re training in our labs.

Threading requires precise alignment, force control, and fine manipulation. These are foundational capabilities for industrial dexterity applications that are currently inaccessible with traditional automation.

We teleoperate these tasks to collect the data that trains our Physical AI. Next stop: autonomous.

Visit www.sanctuary.ai to learn more about our Physical AI-enabled automation solutions. 

#Dexterity #DexterousHand #RobotHand #Robotics #RobotsDoingStuff #SanctuaryAI

title: Unitree Invites You to Witness the 2026 Humanoid Robot Combat Competition
summary: Putting technology to the test through combat, and connecting the world through competition. The "CMG 2026 Humanoid Robot Combat Competition" invites you to witness a new chapter in the co-evolution of humans and AI. Stay tuned!

title: NEO’s Hands
summary:
The new 25-DoF robotic hands for the NEO platform mark a fundamental leap in physical AI.

1X has developed hands that achieve human-level dexterity, strength, safety, and reliability. With 25 fully actuated degrees of freedom in the fingers, palm, and thumb including a 3-DoF wrist, a closed-loop tendon-driven system, and high-resolution tactile sensing, these hands enable true in-hand manipulation and precision interaction across countless everyday tasks– from assembling LEGO and installing light bulbs to zipping jackets, pouring tea, and using tools with human-like adaptability (and infinitely more).

Strong yet inherently safe and compliant, IP68 waterproof and food-safe, and built to endure millions of cycles, the new hands don’t just expand NEO’s capabilities. They unlock high-quality, real-world manipulation data at scale, accelerating the training of robust world models and bringing general-purpose autonomy closer than ever.

About 1X: 1X is a leading U.S. based AI and robotics company, developing NEO–the home robot. 1X’s mission is to create an abundant future through safe, intelligent humanoids.
